recommendations.title: Eat Pray Love
recommendations.overview: A married woman realizes how unhappy her marriage really is, and that her life needs to go in a different direction. After a painful divorce, she takes off on a round-the-world journey to "find herself".

recommendations.title: Running with Scissors
recommendations.overview: Young Augusten Burroughs absorbs experiences that could make for a shocking memoir: the son of an alcoholic father and an unstable mother, he's handed off to his mother's therapist, Dr. Finch, and spends his adolescent years as a member of Finch's bi

recommendations.title: The Prom
recommendations.overview: After the PTA of a conservative high school in Indiana bans same-sex couples from attending the annual prom, a gang of flamboyant Broadway stars try to boost their image by showing up to support two lesbian students.

recommendations.title: And the Band Played On
recommendations.overview: The story of the discovery of the AIDS epidemic and the political infighting of the scientific community hampering the early fight with it.

recommendations.title: 13th
recommendations.overview: An in-depth look at the prison system in the United States and how it reveals the nation's history of racial inequality.

recommendations.title: Mario
recommendations.overview: Two young gay soccer players get caught up between the politics of the game and the politics of love.

recommendations.title: Rent
recommendations.overview: In New York City's gritty East Village, a group of bohemians strive for success and acceptance while enduring the obstacles of poverty, illness and the AIDS epidemic.

recommendations.title: Never Rarely Sometimes Always
recommendations.overview: A pair of teenage girls in rural Pennsylvania travel to New York City to seek out medical help after an unintended pregnancy.

recommendations.title: BPM (Beats per Minute)
recommendations.overview: Paris, in the early 1990s: a group of young activists is desperately tied to finding the cure against an unknown lethal disease. They target the pharmaceutical labs that are retaining potential cures, and multiply direct actions, with the hope of sav

recommendations.title: The First King
recommendations.overview: Romulus and Remus, two shepherds and loyal brothers, end up taking part to a journey that will lead one of them to be the founder of the greatest nation ever seen. However, the fate of the chosen one will pass from killing his own brother.
